Diagram Legend
• Purple: Controller • Blue: Builder Service
• Teal: Parser Service • Orange: Validator Service
• Green: Exporter Adapter • Indigo: Converter Service • Gray: External System

div.div:
Implementation Notes:
• Stdio JSON-RPC 2.0 transport protocol
• Draw.io Desktop CLI subprocess integration
• Automated geometric collision & layout validation
• Bi-directional Mermaid JS flowchart conversion stream
